It is suitable for managing network traffic. The Mercusys MS128GP 28-Port Gigabit with 24-Port PoE+ is supposed to be placed in a rack. This type features a switching capacity of 448 Gb/s. The Switch is equipped with 26 × RJ-45 ports that provide connection with network elements. 2 SFP connectors serve to transport data via optical fibers. 10/100/1000Base-T technology facilitates file transfer with a speed of up to 1000 Mbit/s. It features Dual Personality ports, which are notable for incorporating both the RJ-45 and SFP connector ; however, only one can be active at a time.  The switch dimensions are 44 × 440 × 180mm. The Mercusys device works with PoE technology, which provides power and signal connection to end devices with just one LAN cable. items.raw_desc: LTE antenna Poynting XPOL-2-5G:        Directional antenna Poynting XPOL-2-5G with cross-polarization is the optimal solution for 4G/5G reception and backward compatible with LTE/2G/3G in areas with weak signal. Two integrated 2 MIMO antennas with opposite polarization support diversity of reception and thus ensure a quality signal. Compared to the previous generation, this antenna has a redesigned inner part for even higher efficiency. In addition to the new bands, the gain at 1700 MHz and 2.7 GHz is approximately 3 dB higher than the previous generation. Antenna Poynting XPOL-2-5G  is supplied with double low-loss cable HDF-195 of 5 m length terminated with 2× SMA-m connector. The SMA connector used is commonly used in a wide range of routers. To maximize signal quality and minimize potential transients, the antenna does not use connectors and the cable is connected directly.
